channel.title: adarshsheth.wixsite.com
channel.description: Hi, I'm Adarsh Sheth! I'm an undergraduate student in Aerospace Engineering at Texas A&M with a passion for photography, robotics, and writing.

item.title: Welcome to my portfolio. Here you'll find a selection of my work. Explore my projects to learn more about what I do.
item.dc:creator: Administrator
item.description: Welcome to my portfolio. Here you'll find a selection of my work, including engineering organizations, events, and projects I've participated in. Explore my portfolio to learn more about what I do.

item.title: Welcome to my resume page! Here, you will find an overview of my professional journey, skills, and accomplishments.
item.dc:creator: Administrator
item.description: Welcome to my resume page! Here, you will find an overview of my professional journey, skills, and accomplishments.

item.title: This blog is a space for curiosity and critical thinking—a place to challenge assumptions, explore new perspectives, and question the familiar. My posts will cover societal problems, human psychology, and inspirational content.
item.dc:creator: Administrator
item.description: This blog is a space for curiosity and critical thinking—a place to challenge assumptions, explore new perspectives, and question the familiar. My posts will cover societal problems, human psychology, and inspirational content.

item.title: Adarsh Sheth
item.dc:creator: Administrator
item.description: Hi, I'm Adarsh Sheth! I'm an undergraduate student in Aerospace Engineering at Texas A&M with a passion for photography, robotics, and writing.
